description: CRITICAL: This is the DEFAULT tool for listing contacts - use this instead of contacts_get_all. NEVER make up or guess contact data. Use cases: (1) 'list my contacts' or 'show contacts' - returns total count plus first 10 contacts (name and phone only). (2) 'find contact named X' or 'search for X' - use searchKey parameter to find specific contacts. (3) 'how many contacts do I have' - returns totalCount. For browsing more contacts, use contacts_get_all with pagination.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to retrieve contact summary for a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.

searchKey.description: Optional search keyword to filter contacts by name or phone number

totalCount.description: Total number of contacts (or matching contacts if searchKey provided)

contacts.description: First 10 contacts (simplified: name and phone only). Use contacts_get_all with pagination if you need more.

hasMore.description: True if there are more contacts beyond the first 10. Use contacts_get_all with pagination to see more.
